---
title: "NeurIPS 2019: Old Friends and Mentors"
description: "Running into former skip Salim Roukos and former CMU officemate Ari Font Llitjós at NeurIPS."
author: "synesis"
date: "2019-12-10"
categories: [conference, personal, CMU]
image: cover.jpg
---

![NeurIPS 2019.](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

So so happy to see my former skip (and my role model) Salim Roukos, and my former officemate back in CMU Ariadna (Ari) Font Llitjós!!!


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_neurips2019-activity-6610027191982002176-rkKv).*
